name: Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add ginger, garlic, and onion, and stir-fry over medium to medium-high heat for 1/2 to 1 minute.
3. Add turmeric, chili powder, and masala. Stir-fry for an additional 1/2 minute.
4. Add mashed potato and mix.
5. Cook and stir for 3 minutes.
6. Gradually add water, one cup at a time, stirring constantly with a wire whisk to prevent lumps from forming.
7. Continue stirring until the mixture is smooth.
8. Stir in tofu and spinach. Mix well and bring to a boil.
9. Add vinegar, soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Simmer for 5 minutes.
10. If the soup is too thick, add more water as needed.
11. Stir in green onions and cilantro. Mix well.
12. Makes about 8 cups.
